name: Fresh Apple Loaf
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
Cream honey and butter together with a fork. Add lemon peel.
Beat the egg and buttermilk.
Sift flours, salt, baking powder, cinnamon, and baking soda together; stir in wheat germ.
Mix the dry ingredients into the wet ingredients, avoiding lumps but do not overbeat. Add the apples and stir to combine.
Fill a greased 8 by 4 inch loaf pan and sprinkle top with 1 tablespoon wheat germ.
Bake for about an hour, checking after 40 minutes.
